tasks.label: Run Everything
tasks.detail: Builds and starts the local Docker Compose stack.

tasks.label: Stop Everything
tasks.detail: Stops the local Docker Compose stack.

tasks.label: Rebuild MAL Model
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml build --no-cache mal-api && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d mal-api
tasks.detail: Forces a fresh MAL image build so the model is retrained, then restarts mal-api.

tasks.label: Simulate MAL GitHub Action
tasks.command: docker build -t sep4-mal-api-test ./MAL && docker run --rm sep4-mal-api-test python -m pytest app
tasks.detail: Builds the MAL Docker image and runs tests inside it, matching the simplified CI workflow.
